description: The client has requested a change to the project scope (e.g., adding a new building). A project manager must create a formal change order.

nodes.task_description: Create a new change order in the project management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully initiates the change order record.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the cost and schedule impact of the requested change.

expected_outcome.value: Agent works with engineering and procurement to determine the change will add $500,000 and 30 days to the project.

nodes.task_description: Submit the change order, including the cost and schedule impact, to the client for their approval before proceeding.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the formal change order to the client for their signature.
